name: MA'EN JUTSU: KAENGUI (FIENDFIRE TECHNIQUE: FLAME EATER)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 6

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 5

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: E, F, S

You carve sizzling runes into yourself. The seal absorbs the first 10 points of fire damage that would be dealt to you, after which it blackens and becomes inactive.

While the seal is active, you can spend a full-round action which requires concentration to absorb any energy absorbed by the seal, gaining either 1 temporary Chakra or 2 temporary HP per 5 fire damage the seal had absorbed, which will last for 5 minutes. Doing so will cause the rune to fade and disappear. This technique takes up one seal slot, and you deal yourself 2 damage when performing it. You cannot have more than one of this seal at the same time.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra and deal yourself 1 additional damage to increase the amount of Chakra the seal can absorb by 3 (up to 25 damage absorption total).
